title: Classes & Camps
lede: From after-school classes, to one and two week-long summer camps, our programs build skills, confidence, and friendships.
summer_intro: Join us for a fun-filled summer through our scripted camps, improv camps, musical theatre camps, and general drama camps running from June 8th through August 7th. Camps are open for kids ages 5-15, and whether they've taken a theatre class before or this will be their first theatre experience, they're guaranteed to have a great time!
summer_hours: Full-day sessions: 8:30 am – 3:30 pm. Half-day sessions (5–6-year-olds): AM 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, PM 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm.
summer_locations:
Congregation Beth Am – Los Altos Hills, CA
Gardner Bullis Elementary School – Los Altos, CA
Loyola Elementary School – Los Altos, CA
PYT Studios – Mountain View, CA
summer_pricing:
Two-week full-day sessions: $945
$850 prorated rate for camps during Juneteenth and the 4th of July holiday
One-week full-day sessions: $525
$475 prorated rate for camps during the 4th of July holiday
One-week half-day sessions: $375
summer_scholarships_note: Scholarships are available based on need and availability.
summer_cancellation_body:
All cancellation or transfer requests must be made in writing to the email below.

Before April 30th: No cancellation or transfer fees.

After April 30th but earlier than three weeks from the start date: cancellation requests are subject to a $50 fee, and transfer requests to a $25 fee.

Fewer than three weeks before the start date: transfer requests are subject to a $75 fee. We cannot provide a refund for cancellations made less than three weeks before the start of your camp.
